moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival wraps up
moments.blurb: The iconic Isle of Wight Festival concludes today after four days of music featuring headliners like The Cure, Lewis Capaldi, and Calvin Harris.

source.l: Isle of Wight Festival Official Site

angles.name: Festival Farewell
angles.copy: That's a wrap for the Isle of Wight Festival 2026! Who caught The Cure, Lewis Capaldi or Calvin Harris this weekend? What was your highlight?

angles.name: Best of IOW
angles.copy: From legends to rising stars, the Isle of Wight Festival brought the noise! What was the standout set for you on the final day?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival finishes in Glasgow
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green bids farewell to TRNSMT Festival today, after a weekend packed with performances from headliners Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Glasgow Green Goodbye
angles.copy: TRNSMT 2026 closes its gates today! Who tore up Glasgow Green for you this weekend? Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian or Lewis Capaldi?

angles.name: TRNSMT Highlights
angles.copy: Another year, another incredible TRNSMT! What were your favourite moments or surprise acts from Glasgow’s biggest festival?

moments.title: Lana Del Rey turns 41
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, known for her melancholic and cinematic music, celebrates her 41st birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Lana
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the one and only Lana Del Rey! What's your go-to track for those 'summertime sadness' vibes?

angles.name: Lana's Legacy
angles.copy: From 'Video Games' to 'Did You Know That There's a Tunnel Under Ocean Blvd', Lana Del Rey's influence is undeniable. Celebrating her 41st today!

moments.title: Summer Solstice: Longest day of the year
moments.blurb: Today marks the Summer Solstice in the Northern Hemisphere, making it the longest day and shortest night of 2026.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Happy Summer Solstice! Enjoy every minute of the longest day of 2026 today. How are you soaking up the extra daylight?

angles.name: Solstice Sunrise
angles.copy: The sun is at its highest point – it's the Summer Solstice! Wishing you a bright and beautiful day.

moments.title: Lionel Richie turned 77
moments.blurb: Music legend Lionel Richie, known for hits like 'All Night Long' and 'Hello', celebrated his 77th birthday yesterday, June 20th.

angles.name: Still Celebrating Lionel
angles.copy: Still celebrating the legend! Lionel Richie turned 77 yesterday. What's your all-time favourite Lionel track?

angles.name: Hello Lionel
angles.copy: Is it him you're looking for? Happy belated 77th Birthday to the one and only Lionel Richie! What a career.

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning pop icon Cyndi Lauper, famous for 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and 'True Colors', celebrates her 73rd birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Cyndi Lauper turns 73 tomorrow. What's your favourite hit from the 'Queen of Quirky Pop'?

angles.name: True Colors
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're wishing a very happy 73rd to the incredible Cyndi Lauper! Her music truly shows her 'True Colors'.

moments.title: Lexus Eastbourne International continues
moments.blurb: The Lexus Eastbourne International tennis tournament, a key warm-up for Wimbledon, is currently underway and runs until June 27th.

angles.name: Eastbourne Tennis
angles.copy: The grass court action is heating up at the Lexus Eastbourne International this week! Who are you backing for the title?

angles.name: Wimbledon Warm-up
angles.copy: Catching some of the best tennis players in the world at Eastbourne before Wimbledon kicks off next week. Who's been impressing you?

moments.title: Wimbledon Championships begin
moments.blurb: The prestigious Wimbledon Championships 2026 will kick off on Monday, June 29, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to the All England Club.

angles.name: Wimbledon Countdown
angles.copy: The wait is almost over! Wimbledon 2026 starts on Monday, June 29th. Who are you hoping to see lift the trophy this year?

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream
angles.copy: Get your strawberries and cream ready! The Wimbledon Championships begin in just over a week. Who's excited for two weeks of tennis?

moments.title: Ariana Grande turns 33
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar Ariana Grande, known for her powerful vocals and chart-topping hits, celebrates her 33rd birthday on June 26th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ari
angles.copy: Mark your calendars! Ariana Grande turns 33 on Thursday. What's your favourite Ariana era or song?

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: From Nickelodeon to global pop icon, Ariana Grande has done it all. Wishing her a very happy 33rd birthday this Thursday!

moments.title: Taylor Swift tops UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' has claimed the number one spot on the latest UK Official Singles Chart for the week ending June 25, 2026.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: It's official: Taylor Swift is Number 1 on the UK Singles Chart with 'I Knew It, I Knew You'! What a track!

angles.name: Swift's Reign
angles.copy: Another week, another chart-topper for Taylor Swift! 'I Knew It, I Knew You' is your UK Number 1. Are you streaming it on repeat?
